heading: Why book your guesthouse through us

cards.title: We check the reviews ourselves
cards.text: Guesthouse quality varies more than resorts. We only list places we'd recommend to a friend, not just anyone with availability.

cards.title: Confirmed bookings, not promises
cards.text: You get the guesthouse's own confirmation directly — not just our invoice — so there's no risk of a no-show reservation.

cards.title: Combine it with a resort
cards.text: Want both culture and a proper reef? Our Resort + Local Island Combo blends a few nights here with a few nights at a resort.
